mapper.select: SELECT PROFILE_URL fileUrl FROM TB_PROFILE WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
SELECT #{userNo} AS userNo, (SELECT COUNT (*) FROM TB_BOARD WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}) boardCount, (SELECT COUNT (*) FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}) commentCount FROM dual
SELECT COMMENT_NO commentNo, USER_NO userNo, BOARD_NO boardNo, CONTENT content, CREATE_DATE createDate FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
